name: Push Ups
lead: Exercise for chest, triceps, deltoids and biceps

instructions.starting position: Face down, arms outstretched, hands wide apart, resting on the floor and aligned with your pectoral muscles. Legs stretched and face pointed towards the ground.
instructions.execution: Slowly bend your arms, letting your chest come closer to the ground, until your elbows form a 90 degrees angle. Then return to the starting position by pushing on your hands.
